title: Does WoW copy from Eva
wikitext:
[]: Does WoW copy from Eva?             Quote Post by danmilligan » Tue Mar 31, 2009 9:05 pm Ok so since we are admittedly geeks, there are bound to be SOME of us who play World of Warcraft. I can't help but notice that the best helmet for hunters has a set of four 'eyes' on the front that look remarkably like Asuka's Unit 02. What do you think? Direct imitation or coincidence?

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Tue Mar 31, 2009 9:17 pm COINCIDENCE.

[]:             Quote Post by Logan Payne » Tue Mar 31, 2009 9:50 pm NO! If you noticed that the helmet comes from Naxxramas you might have also noticed the place is full of freaking spiders. The Tier 7 Armor was also just and updated tier 3 model from when Naxxramas was in Eastern Plaugelands. When it was tier 3, you constructed this armor from cryptstalkers which were these types of insanely disgusting spiders you had to farm for their stuff. The result became spider-like armor. Not evangelion-like. P.S. Nose is mislocated

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Tue Mar 31, 2009 9:51 pm seeing as the rest of the helm looks like a spider, i'd say coincidence. those arent even 02's real eyes, her real eyes are more angry looking, not goggles...

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Tue Mar 31, 2009 10:07 pm Sachi_13 wrote: COINCIDENCE.

[]:             Quote Post by LIGHTFIRELT » Tue Mar 31, 2009 10:26 pm Not a bad observation but probaly just plain concidence, though Blizzard is known for drawing inspiration from various pop culture.

[]:             Quote Post by Logan Payne » Wed Apr 01, 2009 12:36 am LIGHTFIRELT wrote: Not a bad observation but probaly just plain concidence, though Blizzard is known for drawing inspiration from various pop culture.

[]:             Quote Post by Ironfoot » Wed Apr 01, 2009 12:42 am This thread is very similar to a thread that I started some time ago on the same concept of similarities, except it had to do with Smash Bros Brawl: http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=4696 In the end, its probably a coincidence.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Apr 01, 2009 12:48 am Eva-02 ripped off the rear lights I have to look at when I drive home at night and get stuck behind somebody. Logan Payne wrote: 4 Eyes is not an eva exclusive idea, four eyes.

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Wed Apr 01, 2009 1:27 am theres a spiraly column in blood elf architecture that always reminds me of a longinus lance

[]:             Quote Post by Dr. Nick » Wed Apr 01, 2009 5:27 am Uguu~

[]:             Quote Post by Xeroko » Wed Apr 01, 2009 4:35 pm I noticed this with the tier 4 warrior helm:

[]:             Quote Post by danmilligan » Thu Apr 02, 2009 8:42 pm All I know is putting four eyes on something like that makes it look totally epic, and I can't look at it without thinking of unit 02

[]:             Quote Post by LIGHTFIRELT » Thu Apr 02, 2009 10:22 pm Logan Payne wrote: LIGHTFIRELT wrote: Not a bad observation but probaly just plain concidence, though Blizzard is known for drawing inspiration from various pop culture.

[]:             Quote Post by Zaiku » Fri Apr 03, 2009 10:29 pm http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=wszzNg6zJeE As soon as I saw this thread, this video came to mind, if only it were official blizzard lol.

[]:             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Fri Apr 03, 2009 11:26 pm Come on people, do I have to say it? What is the first given fact of Eva lore? 1. EVERYTHING COPIES FROM EVA. Space Runaway Ideon copied from Eva, Heart of Darkness copied from Eva, J.S. Bach copied from Eva, even THE BIBLE copied from Eva (and is probably the driving reason why it became, and still is the world's #1 bestseller). So in short, if you have a question which includes the words "copied from Eva", the answer is YES , because we all know the Time Machine created a temporal paradox that made it at least as old as the written word .

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Apr 04, 2009 4:41 am Alaska Slim wrote: 1. EVERYTHING COPIES FROM EVA.

[]:             Quote Post by Zaiku » Sat Apr 04, 2009 5:45 am 1. EVERYTHING COPIES FROM EVA.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Apr 04, 2009 6:19 am The Bible doesn't need to be any more fucked up than it already is.

[]:             Quote Post by chee » Sat Apr 04, 2009 11:35 am I...er.....hhn....gah.....wha.....hrrnntt.......ffgngt........
summary:
[]: Does WoW copy from Eva?             Quote Post by danmilligan » Tue Mar 31, 2009 9:05 pm Ok so since we are admittedly geeks, there are bound to be SOME of us who play World of Warcraft. I can't help but notice that the best helmet for hunters has a set of four 'eyes' on the front that look remarkably like Asuka's Unit 02. What do you think? Direct imitation or coincidence?
